name: Chutney Ham Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1 lb. 4 oz. can Dole Chunk Pineapple in Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving 2 tablespoons of juice.
2. Arrange the pineapple, ham, and cheese on top of each of four salad plates lined with crisp salad greens.
3. For dressing, combine the sour cream, reserved juice, and chutney in a bowl.
4. Spoon the dressing over each salad to serve. Makes 4 servings.
